info: Six fresh wallets collectively netted ~$1.2M betting YES on US striking Iran by Feb 28. Most wallets funded within 24 hours of the strike. Identified by Bubblemaps on-chain analysis.
User 'Magamyman' made $553K betting YES on Khamenei out of power, hours before the Feb 28 Israeli strike. Single large directional bet.
Fresh account wagered $32K that Maduro would be removed by Jan 31, hours before US operation. Payout ~$400K. Triggered Rep. Torres to introduce insider trading legislation.
Two Israelis (IDF reservist and civilian) charged by Israeli prosecutors with using classified military intelligence to bet on Polymarket. Earned $150K+ combined.
